classical_node_name: Sexually dimorphic nucleus of the preoptic area (SDN-POA) calbindin neuron
anatomy_note: KB uses MBA:464 for SDN-POA anatomical location; MBA:464 resolves in the atlas to Paraventricular hypothalamic nucleus descending division, not MPN. The anatomically correct structure for SDN-POA is MBA:515 (Medial preoptic nucleus). Find-candidates queries used MBA:464, causing anatomy-match failures at rank-1 (all score=1, no anatomy hit). This discrepancy is flagged in the KB and does not affect the final recommendation because SUPT_0423 was identified via Calb1 marker match and confirmed by manual child-cluster analysis against MBA:515.

recommended_rank1_candidate.label: 0423 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
recommended_rank1_candidate.assessment_rationale: SUPT_0423 is the only rank-1 candidate with MPN (MBA:515) cells and high Calb1 expression. Child-cluster analysis identifies CLUS_1550 as the best within-supertype match for SDN-POA identity. Th discordance is a concern but likely attributable to non-MPN components of this multi-region supertype.

supertype_expression.note: Supertype-level Th=0.99 reflects mixed regional composition (BST, AHN, PVN, MPN). Th signal is unlikely to originate primarily from the MPN component.

location_fraction_MPN.note: MPN cells across all SUPT_0423 children: CLUS_1548 contributes 10 MPN cells, CLUS_1549 contributes 14 MPN cells, CLUS_1550 contributes 22 MPN cells (primary soma). Total anatomy cell count across all children estimated at 242. MPN-primary fraction (CLUS_1550 only): 22/242 = 9.1%. Total MPN fraction (all children): 46/242 = 19.0%.

best_child_cluster.label: 1550 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
supporting_criteria: Primary soma in MBA:515 (MPN) — anatomically correct for SDN-POA
Calb1=6.66 (high, consistent with SDN-POA calbindin-D28K defining marker)
MFR=3.35 (male-biased, consistent with MALE_BIASED classical node sex_bias)
concerns: Th=2.75 (non-zero; classical node asserts Th NEGATIVE — no TH cell bodies in SDN-POA)
CLUS_1550 has only 22 cells in MPN; additional cells in PVHap (n=4), PVH (n=9), Hypothalamus (n=9) — cluster is not MPN-restricted
DEFINING markers (Fbxw21, Sostdc1) are not SDN-POA-specific and are not in the classical marker set
best_child_cluster.Th_discordance_interpretation: Th=2.75 in CLUS_1550 is lower than CLUS_1547 context but non-trivial. Given CLUS_1550 cells are distributed across MPN, PVH, PVHap, and Hypothalamus, Th expression may originate from non-MPN cells within this cluster. Cannot exclude Th expression in the MPN component without single-cell spatial resolution. This remains an open concern.

child_cluster_comparison.label: 1547 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
child_cluster_comparison.primary_soma: MBA:351 (Bed nuclei of stria terminalis, n=13)
child_cluster_comparison.assessment: WRONG_REGION — BST primary, not MPN. Th=0.0 is consistent with SDN-POA but anatomy is disqualifying.

child_cluster_comparison.label: 1548 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
child_cluster_comparison.assessment: WRONG_REGION — AHN primary, not MPN. Also has 10 MPN cells but MPN is not the dominant location. Calb1 lower than CLUS_1550.

child_cluster_comparison.label: 1549 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
child_cluster_comparison.assessment: WRONG_REGION — PVN primary, not MPN. Highest Calb1 in supertype (7.71) and male-biased, but anatomically in PVN. Has 14 MPN cells as secondary location.

child_cluster_comparison.label: 1550 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
child_cluster_comparison.assessment: BEST_CHILD — Only cluster with MPN as primary soma. Calb1=6.66 and MFR=3.35 both support SDN-POA identity. Th=2.75 is a concern (see above).

rank0_top_candidates_assessment.label: 1588 RT-ZI Gnb3 Gaba_2
rank0_top_candidates_assessment.primary_anatomy: MBA:262 (Reticular nucleus of the thalamus, n=236)
rank0_top_candidates_assessment.calb1_evidence: Calb1 appears only in MERFISH panel (not DEFINING or DEFINING_SCOPED) — Calb1 is not a primary marker for this cluster
rank0_top_candidates_assessment.assessment_rationale: Primary soma in Reticular nucleus of thalamus (RT), which has no anatomical relationship to SDN-POA (MPN). The high MFR drove the score=2, but sex bias alone is insufficient in the absence of anatomical overlap. Calb1 is not a defining marker of this cluster. DISCARD — anatomy is disqualifying.
concerns: No cells in MBA:515 (MPN) or any preoptic area region
Calb1 only in MERFISH panel, not defining marker
Pvalb, Npy, Sst expression profile does not match SDN-POA calbindin neuron
Thalamic reticular location is inconsistent with hypothalamic SDN-POA

rank0_top_candidates_assessment.label: 1689 SBPV-PVa Six6 Satb2 Gaba_2
rank0_top_candidates_assessment.primary_anatomy: MBA:88 (Anterior hypothalamic nucleus, n=13); MBA:30 (PVHap, n=5); MBA:63 (PVHd, n=2); MBA:1097 (Hypothalamus, n=10)
rank0_top_candidates_assessment.assessment_rationale: Calb1 is a DEFINING marker (stronger evidence than CLUS_1588) and MFR=8.09 is the highest of any rank-0 candidate. However, no cells in MBA:515 (MPN). Primary anatomy is AHN/SBPV/periventricular hypothalamus — adjacent to but distinct from the preoptic area. Six6 is the primary defining transcription factor; SDN-POA neurons have not been reported to express Six6. Tac2 neuropeptide expression is not documented for SDN-POA. UNLIKELY — Calb1 and sex bias are positive but anatomy does not match SDN-POA.
concerns: No cells in MBA:515 (MPN) — all anatomy is in SBPV, AHN, PVH regions
Six6 as primary TF/defining marker — not reported for SDN-POA neurons
Tac2 neuropeptide — not a documented SDN-POA marker
SBPV (subparaventricular zone) is posterior/dorsal to preoptic area

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0423 BST-MPN Six3 Nrgn Gaba_4
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Only rank-1 candidate with MPN (MBA:515) cells. CLUS_1550 child cluster has MPN as primary soma, Calb1=6.66, MFR=3.35. Th discordance present but likely from non-MPN cells in multi-region supertype.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 1048 CS-PRNr-DR En1 Sox2 Gaba_2
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Pontine/raphe region (PRNr, DR) — no anatomical relationship to SDN-POA or preoptic area.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0227 Sst Gaba_14
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Sst-primary supertype — SDN-POA classical node is Sst-negative. Label prefix indicates Sst as primary defining marker, inconsistent with Calb1-primary SDN-POA identity.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0225 Sst Gaba_12
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Sst-primary supertype — same reasoning as SUPT_0227.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0288 STR-PAL Chst9 Gaba_4
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Striatal-pallidal region (STR-PAL) — no anatomical relationship to SDN-POA.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0143 OB Meis2 Thsd7b Gaba_1
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Olfactory bulb (OB) — no anatomical relationship to SDN-POA.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0496 LGv-ZI Otx2 Gaba_1
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Lateral geniculate/zona incerta — no anatomical relationship to SDN-POA.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0525 LHA Barhl2 Glut_2
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Glutamatergic lateral hypothalamic area — SDN-POA neurons are not documented as glutamatergic. Anatomy also wrong.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0704 PAG-MRN Pou3f1 Glut_1
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Periaqueductal gray / midbrain reticular nucleus — brainstem location, no relationship to SDN-POA.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0925 PCG-PRNr Vsx2 Nkx6-1 Glut_1
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Pontine reticular region — brainstem location, no relationship to SDN-POA.

rank1_full_candidate_list.label: 0906 LDT-PCG Vsx2 Lhx4 Glut_1
rank1_full_candidate_list.rationale_summary: Laterodorsal tegmental region — brainstem location, no relationship to SDN-POA.

annotation_transfer_evidence.note: No AnnotationTransferEvidence found in kb/draft/ for CS20230722_SUPT_0423 or child clusters CLUS_1547, CLUS_1548, CLUS_1549, CLUS_1550. AT pipeline has not been run for this classical node.

key_supporting_evidence: CLUS_1550 primary soma in MBA:515 (MPN, n=22) — anatomically correct for SDN-POA
Calb1=6.66 (high expression) — matches SDN-POA primary defining marker (IHC calbindin-D28K)
MFR=3.35 — consistent with MALE_BIASED sex_bias of classical node
GABA neurotransmitter type — consistent with GABAergic nature of hypothalamic interneurons
key_concerns: Th=2.75 in CLUS_1550 — discordant with classical Th NEGATIVE marker assertion; cannot exclude Th expression in MPN-component cells at current resolution
SUPT_0423 spans BST, AHN, PVN, and MPN — supertype-level mapping captures many non-SDN-POA cells; CLUS_1550 is the narrower, more specific match
CLUS_1550 defining markers (Fbxw21, Sostdc1) are not documented SDN-POA markers — correspondence relies on anatomy + Calb1 alone
SDN-POA is a histologically defined subnucleus within MPN not resolvable in WMBv1 MERFISH spatial data
MBA:464 vs MBA:515 discrepancy in KB — find-candidates queries missed anatomy match; manual curation required
summary.rank0_recommendation: Neither CLUS_1588 nor CLUS_1689 improves on SUPT_0423 as a mapping candidate. CLUS_1588 is thalamic (RT) and anatomically disqualifying. CLUS_1689 has Calb1 as DEFINING and the highest MFR (8.09) but no MPN cells; anatomy is SBPV/AHN/periventricular. CLUS_1550 (child of SUPT_0423) remains the best available cluster-level match.
next_steps: Correct MBA:464 annotation in classical node to MBA:515 to fix anatomy matching in future find-candidates runs
Run annotation transfer (annotation-transfer workflow) with an SDN-POA or MPN Calb1+ scRNA-seq dataset to assess F1 score against CLUS_1550
Inspect MERFISH spatial data for SUPT_0423 cells in MBA:515 to assess sub-regional clustering consistent with SDN-POA dorsomedial position
Check whether Th expression in CLUS_1550 is spatially restricted to non-MPN cells using MERFISH Th channel
